mapper.select: SELECT * FROM time_slots WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM time_slots WHERE listing_id = #{listingId} ORDER BY slot_date, start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO time_slots (listing_id, slot_date, start_time, end_time, capacity, booked_count, version) VALUES (#{listingId}, #{slotDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity}, #{bookedCount}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE time_slots SET booked_count = booked_count + 1, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND booked_count < capacity
UPDATE time_slots SET booked_count = booked_count - 1, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND booked_count > 0
